keep.reason: Provides the most urgent practical takeaway for applied researchers as the primary skim hook.
Crucial boundary-condition guidance to prevent practitioners from double-counting the correction.
Translates the workflow contribution into a concrete standard that applied teams can demand.
Accurately scopes the core theoretical result to proper imputation, estimated scale, and complete-data target.
Correctly identifies the LRT differential bias at the null and contrasts it with the naive trace difference.
Clearly states the model-specific nature of the IC bias and the exact theoretical centering correction.
Establishes the workflow as a first-class contribution by highlighting mechanically verified evidence and the caught sign error.
Provides honest scoping by disclosing the structural limits of the correction, preventing over-generalization.

drop_notes: Dropped other pooled items to consolidate the strongest, most accurately scoped claims across all required categories within the 8-item limit.
